current_publish_gate.status: publish packet ready; live publish pending explicit approval
current_publish_gate.canonical_schema_path: Sonic Data Lineage / Database Catalog / SQL Server / eLeadDW / dbo

batch_rules.preferred_unit: one platform/database/schema when object count is within the ceiling
batch_rules.split_rule: schemas above the ceiling split by object type, then into deterministic chunks by downstream use, upstream use, and object name
batch_rules.priority_rule: high-use object count, then downstream use count, then upstream input count, then object count
batch_rules.publish_gate: every batch needs dry-run, reviewed publish packet, explicit live approval, and post-publish readback
batch_rules.cleanup_gate: cleanup/archive/delete/move stays out of Tier 2 publish batches
